content.summary: Auth pipeline significantly improved. Direct API access works, external access has routing issues.
working: Direct server: /api/login-check returns 200 with rate limit check
Custom endpoint code deployed and functional
remaining_issues: Next.js basePath removed - may affect other routes
content.recommendation: The login form may work through NextAuth's standard signIn flow. Test the actual login UI to see if users can authenticate. Rate limit pre-check is secondary.
next_steps: Consider moving rate-limit check into NextAuth authorize callback
